bodyPreview:
Discover the depth and coverage of your genome sequencing data

Includes a graph and table that provides the average, maximum, and minimum depth for your entire genome and broken down by each chromosome (1-22, X, Y and M).

Determine if your genome was truly sequenced at 30x.
evidenceNotes: Marketplace detail reportData confirms title, publisher/provider when available, price/product metadata when available, categories, sample-report link when available, and overview/disclaimer tab boundaries when present.
Use overview/marketing text only for report purpose and marketplace positioning, not for local genetic, medical, diet, supplement, medication, ancestry, fitness, or performance conclusions.
No raw genome data, uploaded genome data, or account navigation text is included in this artifact.
source: in-app browser sequencing.com marketplace detail page __NEXT_DATA__.props.pageProps.reportData extraction
summaryPreview: Discover the depth and coverage of your genome sequencing data.
title: Sequencing Depth and Coverage
visibleParagraphs: Discover the depth and coverage of your genome sequencing data.
